description.value:
Forms only when the fext @UUID[Compendium.cotct-pf2e-conversion.cotct-actors.Actor.ukwarFext0000001]{Ukwar} is permanently slain (by glass or obsidian, B29): her grateful spirit sighs thanks and sinks into her own +1 striking battleaxe, making it a sinister but genuinely loyal intelligent weapon.

Ukwar (intelligent +1 striking battleaxe): speaks Common and Orc in a dead chieftain's flat voice; perceives 30 feet (darkvision). She urges her wielder to hunt worthy foes and despises cowardice — but remembers her release with something like gratitude. Once per day she channels her old hunger through a hit: the target must attempt @Check[type:fortitude|dc:30] or become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1} (she shares the stolen vigor: the wielder gains 10 temporary HP for 1 minute).

publication.title: Pathfinder: Curse of the Crimson Throne (PF2e conversion, private)
